short_description: Professional audio utility with a precise RTA, pinouts, & ear training tools.
long_description: SoundEngg Console is a professional-grade utility suite built specifically for live sound engineers, Front of House (FOH) technicians, monitor mixers, and system designers. Equipped with a high-performance Real-Time Analyzer (RTA), this app provides the reference tools needed for venue tuning, system calibration, and feedback elimination. Core Engineering Modules: • Precision RTA Analyzer: Monitor frequencies in real time with 1/3 and 1/6 ISO octave resolution to instantly pinpoint hot frequencies. • Signal Generator: Inject pink noise, white noise, and frequency sweeps for system verification and testing. • Ear Training Trainer: Practice and hone your spectral identification accuracy to mix faster and protect your hearing. • Acoustic & Time Calculators: Compute speaker delay lines, subwoofer array spacing (cardioid & splay), and speaker impedance/load calculations. • Cable Pinout Reference Guide: Quick wiring layouts for XLR, TRS, Speakon, RJ45, and power connectors. Access a stable, low-latency RTA and utility system entirely offline. Calibrate your microphones, test acoustic environments, and optimize system parameters on the fly.
